input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported javac failure is caused by tests using constructor signatures that do not match maven-artifact 2.0.7, not by missing setup.

Tests that run real Maven build goals may touch the user Maven repository or attempt plugin/artifact resolution; prefer isolated API/resource/diagnostic coverage or explicit temporary paths inside the test if such scenarios are added.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7 resolves its Maven 2.x/Plexus/ClassWorlds/Wagon dependencies transitively, and meaningful metadata coverage can be reached through core APIs, diagnosticians, resources, and MavenCli --version without Docker, extra Maven dependencies, or required environment/system properties.
